rationale: The equation b + 12 − 9 = 38 correctly represents the situation: b bulbs planted on Monday, 12 more on Tuesday, 9 lost to frost, leaving 38. Solving: b + 3 = 38 → b = 35. Option A has the correct equation and correct solution. Option D has the correct equation but incorrect solution (b = 29), so only A is fully correct and unambiguous.
